gateCheck.reason: 1 HIGH, 2 MEDIUM findings - review shows category.ts is correct (isNull usage), business.ts N+1 is the main issue

findings.title: Duplicate status property in BusinessWithCategory interface
findings.description: The BusinessWithCategory interface has status declared twice (lines 18 and 33). TypeScript ignores duplicate property declarations.
findings.impact: Type definitions may not reflect actual schema, potential runtime bugs
findings.recommendation: Remove the duplicate status: string | null; declaration on line 33

findings.title: N+1 query pattern in getBusinessBySlug()
findings.description: Function makes 3 sequential queries: business (line 66), profileImage (lines 108-116), bannerImage (lines 118-126). These could be combined with a single JOIN or run in parallel with Promise.all().
findings.impact: 3 sequential round-trips to D1 database. With related businesses, page load can have 16+ queries.
findings.recommendation: Use a single JOIN query with COALESCE or Promise.all() to fetch images in parallel

findings.title: Debounce timer not cleaned up on component unmount
findings.description: debounceTimer is a module-level variable that persists across component re-renders. No cleanup function is provided for timer cancellation.
findings.impact: Timer references accumulate in SSR context or when components unmount. Memory leak in long-running sessions.
findings.recommendation: Add a cleanup() function or use nanostores $effect to manage timer lifecycle

findings.title: Debounce timer persists on module reload
findings.description: The debounce timer is not stored in a way that persists across module hot-reloads. Timer references are lost if the module is re-evaluated.
findings.impact: Potential memory leak or stale timers on HMR
findings.recommendation: Consider using a WeakMap or module-level cleanup function for timer management

findings.title: LIKE queries without full-text search index
findings.description: searchBusinesses() uses LIKE with tags and aboutUs columns. Without proper indexes, these queries will perform full table scans on large datasets.
findings.impact: Slow search performance as data grows
findings.recommendation: Consider adding composite indexes or using D1 full-text search FTS5 for production scale

findings.title: getDb() returning null without error
findings.description: getDb() can return null if initialization fails. Calling code doesn't check for null before using.
findings.impact: Potential null pointer if DB initialization fails silently
findings.recommendation: Consider returning a Result.error() from getDb() or throwing an exception on initialization failure

findings.title: Store naming differs from spec
findings.description: Spec defines searchStore, filterStore, paginationStore but implementation uses atoms with $ prefix. This is nanostores convention and works correctly.
findings.impact: Minor naming difference - actual functionality works
findings.recommendation: Update spec to match nanostores naming convention or document the convention

recommendations: Fix duplicate status property in BusinessWithCategory interface
Optimize N+1 query pattern in getBusinessBySlug() using Promise.all() or JOIN
Add cleanup() function to search.ts for debounce timer management
Consider FTS5 index for LIKE queries as data grows

testCheck.note: Test files exist at src/lib/queries/*.test.ts and src/stores/*.test.ts
